vegan-hoppin-john.name: Vegan Hoppin' John
instructions: Bring black-eyed peas and enough water to cover by 2 to 4 inches to a boil in a large pot. Remove pot from heat, cover, and let stand for 1 hour. Drain and rinse.

Bring black-eyed peas, 3 cups water, bay leaf, oregano, and thyme to a boil in a large pot. Cover, reduce heat to low, and simmer for 40 minutes. Add rice, cover, and simmer until black-eyed peas and rice are tender, 30 to 40 minutes more.

Meanwhile, heat olive oil in a nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add onion; sauté until lightly browned, 5 to 7 minutes. Add celery, bell peppers, and jalapeño; sauté 5 minutes. Add garlic; sauté 2 minutes more.

When black-eyed peas tender, add sautéed vegetable mixture, tomatoes, parsley, salt, black pepper, and cayenne pepper to pot; stir until well combined. Cover; set aside to allow flavors to blend, 5 to 10 minutes. Taste and adjust seasonings, if needed.

vegan-hot-dogs-argiro.name: Vegan Hot Dogs
instructions: For vegan hot dog, bake the vegan sausages until golden.
Cut the buns in half with a knife and touch them with the cut side of the hot bowl that we baked the sausages in order to heat and brown lightly.
Fill the bread with the cooked vegan sausage, add the avocado into slices and add the beetroot pickle.
Finally, add the mustard.

vegan-lemon-cake-baked-or-air-fryer-pequ.name: Vegan Lemon Cake (baked Or Air Fryer)
vegan-lemon-cake-baked-or-air-fryer-pequ.original_name: Bizcocho vegano de limón (al horno o en freidora de aire)

ingredients.item: 150 g of sugar (Vegan certificate if you have a strict diet)
125 g vegetable yogurt lemon (or natural) flavour
100 ml de bebida vegetal (avena, soja o almendra)
100 ml de aceite de girasol o de oliva suave
100 g of Glas sugar (Vegan certificate if you have a strict diet)

instructions: It starts by preheating the oven at 180 been 3 been with heat up and down. Fold up the Plum cake mold with some oil or cover with oven paper so that then it's easier to remove the cake.

In a large bowl blend 280 g of wheat flour, 150 g of sugar, 1 sachet of chemical yeast and a pinch of salt. It removes a little with a stick so that the leaven will be well distributed and they will have no clumps.

In another container mix the liquid ingredients: 100 ml of sunflower oil, 100 ml of vegetable drink, 125 g of vegetable yogurt, 60 ml of lemon juice, 1 lemon frilling and, if you wish, a teaspoon of vanilla essence. Bat a moment with some rods or a fork, just to get them integrated.
Fold the fluids onto the dry ingredients and mix them right, without beating too much. The mass should be smooth and homogenous. If you work her too bad, the biscuit can get denser.

Pass the dough to the mold and put it a little with a spatula or the back of a spoon. Put it in the oven for about 35 to 40 minutes, till after a stick with a stick goes out clean. Each oven's a world, so give him an eye from the 30 minutes.
When it's made, get out the biscuit and let it stand at the mold about 10 minutes before you clear it. Then put it onto a grid so it'll cool completely.

Meanwhile, prepare the grease by mixing 100 g of sugar with 2 tablespoons of lemon juice. We have to have a thick but smooth blend that will fall into thread. When the biscuits are cold, pour them above and let them settle.

vegetarian-chop-suey-recipe-comedera.name: Vegetarian Chop Suey Recipe

ingredients.item: ½ cup of white or red wine
1 taza de celery (cortado en tiras delgadas)

instructions: The recipe begins and cuts the carrot, pimenton and onion into thin strips. The broccoli tree should be small.
Ahora, toma el repollo o la col y corta en tiras delgadas. Remoja bien y lava con vinagre, deja escurrir.
Continue and dissolve the tablespoon of Maicena into the wine until fully integrated.
Warm a frying pan or wok with oil.
When hot, add all the vegetables and you will leap for 5 minutes while continuing to move.
After that time, add the vegetable stock and the wine dissolved with the maicena, mix up, put up the fire and let them cook while they move till the liquid thawes a little.
Cuando tenga consistencia, baja el fuego e incorpora la pimienta y la salsa de soya. Mezcla y termina de cocinar por 3 minutos.
Apaga, retira del fuego, deja reposar para que se asienten los sabores.
Serve and enjoy!

veloute-mushroom-soup-argiro.name: Veloute Mushroom Soup
instructions: Rinse the porcini mushrooms first in cold water.
In a bowl, cover with 1/2 cup of boiling water.
Cover the bowl and let them soak for 15'-20', recover moisture.
Clean the mushrooms (we peel them). Remove the legs and wipe them thoroughly with a damp towel.
Cut them into thin slices.
In a pot heat the olive oil over medium heat and sauté the onion for 2–3–1 to city.
Add the fresh mushrooms, garlic and chestnuts.
Drain the dried mushrooms well and add them to the pot.
Drain their water into a fine sheet and discard the cascade (about half the last flush).
Mix well to sauté the mushrooms.
Remove 2 tablespoons of mushrooms (we keep them for the garnishing).
We go out with the cognac.
Add the broth and liquid of the mushrooms.
Cover and boil over medium heat for 20 minutes.
We ground the mushroom soup to become cream and put it back on fire.
Add the cream, nutmeg, salt and pepper.
Mix well, control the density of the soup.
Serve the creamy velvety mushroom soup in a bowl. Garnish each bowl with a few salted mushrooms, chives and a few drops of olive oil.
Sprinkle with freshly ground pepper.

venezuelan-chicha-recipe-comedera.name: Venezuelan Chicha Recipe
instructions: Put the rice in a large paddle and wash with running water for a few minutes.
Vierta el arroz en una olla grande, con las seis tazas de agua. Lleve la olla a la estufa, y cocine a fuego lento, medio tapado por aproximadamente 40 minutos. Agregue la canela en rama.
When most of the water has evaporate, and the rice is a mass of pastous consistency. Turn off the stove and leave it resting for about fifteen minutes to get it shredded.
Remove cinnamon. Put the rice, from time to time, into the glass of the blender and drink it for a few minutes (2 minutes) to get a fully soft and homogenous dough. He mustn't have an umbrella.
Then add liquid milk, condensed milk and vanilla essence. If necessary, add additional sugar. License a few more minutes and get ready.
Para servir, llene los vasos con hielo picado hasta la mitad, y rellene el resto del vaso con la chicha. Decore con leche condensada y canela en polvo.

village-loaves-argiro.name: Village Loaves

ingredients.item: 300 gralley 70 % american (you will find it in supermarkets)
1 pepper red finely chopped in frames
Warm water as it lifts about 1 1⁄2 glass of water
300 gralley 70 % american (you will find it in supermarkets)
1 pepper red finely chopped in frames
Warm water as it lifts about 1 1⁄2 glass of water

instructions: In a small bowl dissolve the yeast with sugar in 1/2 cup of lukewarm water.
Cover with membrane and set the yeast aside for 10 minutes. When blisters appear on the surface, it is ready to add it to the flour.
In an anti-stick pan, without oil, over medium heat, add the onion and pepper to wither for a few minutes.
Let them cool.
Add the flower, salt, cheese, yogurt, bamboo, oregano, activated yeast into the mixer's bowl (with the dough hook) and start to bring a little bit (about 1 1⁄2 glass).
Finally, add the cold vegetables.
Remove the dough on the work bench and knead it with the hands with strong movements and pulls.
In a slightly oiled bowl, add the dough and cover well, with fresh towel or membrane.
Let it double in volume about 1 hour and a little more.

village-terrine-with-black-laurel-of-pat.name: Village Terrine With Black Laurel Of Patras

ingredients.item: 11⁄2 kg pig meat (mixed word and neck)
11⁄2 kg pig meat (mixed word and neck)

instructions: We pick a spatter and a neck. We chop them with a knife or ask our butcher to chop them up (not on the meat machine) with the hand very loose.
Clean with sharp knife the bird livers from the tendons and membranes.
We grind them in the blender in mashed potatoes.
Put the meat in a bowl.
Add the purée from the lips, garlic, cloves, nutmeg, bay leaf and thyme chopped, bread, salt and pepper.
By kneading the mixture a little bit, add the blackwash and continue to ferment well.
We'll use a round refractory vessel 25 cm. Empty the mixture and press it well with the hand to straighten the surface.
We'll bake it in a oven ben-marie, so put the pot with the terina in a baking pan.
Fill in building water in the baking pan to cover the 3/4 of the terina vessel and baking in a well preheated oven, at 160°C, in the resistors, in the last grill, for about 1 hour.
Because the meat we use has enough fat, the tarina at the grill will collect enough.
As it's warm, we'll put it on a grill, and after we throw away the fat, we'll let it drain.
Serve it at room temperature by cutting it into triangle pieces, always with toasted bread and green mixed salad.

vinegary-chicken-with-raisins.name: Vinegary Chicken With Raisins

ingredients.item: . (or more) sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar
. baby arugula or mixed tender greens

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 475°. Season 3 lb. skin-on, bone-in chicken thighs (6–8) on both sides with kosher salt. Heat 1 Tbsp. vegetable oil in a large ovenproof skillet over medium. Arrange chicken, skin side down, in skillet and cook, undisturbed, rotating pan occasionally for even browning, until thighs release easily from pan and skin is golden brown, 8–12 minutes. Turn chicken over.

Transfer skillet to oven and roast chicken until cooked
through and skin is deep golden brown (an instant-read thermometer inserted into
thickest part of a thigh should register 165°), 12–15 minutes. Transfer chicken to a
cutting board, leaving fat behind, and let rest 5–10 minutes.
Carefully pour fat in skillet into a heatproof measuring glass until you have ½ cup (top off with extra-virgin olive oil if short); reserve any excess fat for another use.

Add ½ cup fat back to skillet and heat over medium. Add 1 large shallot, thinly sliced, 3 garlic cloves, finely chopped, and ½ cup raisins; season with salt and freshly ground pepper. Cook, stirring often, until mixture is fragrant and shallot is slightly softened, about 2 minutes. Stir in 2 Tbsp. sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar and cook, stirring, until sauce is slightly reduced, about 1 minute. Remove from heat and add 1 Tbsp. unsalted butter, stirring until melted and sauce is slightly thickened and creamy. Taste pan sauce and add more vinegar and/or season with more salt if needed.

Arrange 5 oz. baby arugula or mixed tender greens (about 6 cups) on a platter or divide among plates and spoon half of pan sauce over. Arrange chicken on top and spoon remaining pan sauce over; season with more pepper. Serve with country-style bread if desired.
